page-creator.description: Creates new Next.js pages with proper file-based routing, GROQ queries, Navbar links, and sitemap entries. Use when user says 'create a new page', 'add a page', 'new route'.

sanity-schema.description: Creates and edits Sanity CMS schema types using defineType(), fieldsets, validation. Use when user says 'new schema', 'content type', 'add field to schema', 'Sanity type'.

groq-writer.description: Writes and optimizes GROQ queries for Sanity data fetching. Use when user says 'write a GROQ query', 'fetch data from Sanity', 'query builder'.

component-creator.description: Creates React components following project conventions (CSS modules, framer-motion, shadcn/ui). Use when user says 'create component', 'new component', 'build a UI element'.

deploy-agent.description: Handles Vercel and Sanity deployments. Knows the project's deploy commands, env vars, and hosting setup. Use when user says 'deploy', 'publish', 'release'.

git-workflow.description: Manages git branch strategy, commit messages, and PR creation following project conventions. Use when user says 'commit', 'branch', 'push', 'pull request', 'PR'.

code-reviewer.description: Reviews code for consistency with UCC INGO project patterns, conventions, and best practices. Use when user says 'review', 'check my code', 'lint'.
